name: M. Hamza Aftab
bio: I'm a Full-Stack Web & Mobile Engineer and AI Specialist based in Dubai, focused on building scalable, high-performance digital products with modern technologies and clean user experiences.

My expertise spans the JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem, including React.js, Next.js, React Native, Vue.js, Nuxt.js, Node.js, and Bun. I develop production-grade web platforms, mobile apps, SaaS products, and backend systems optimized for scalability, performance, and maintainability.

I also specialize in AI-powered applications and LLM integrations, working with tools like Claude AI, OpenAI APIs, prompt engineering workflows, and AI-first product experiences. I enjoy building intelligent applications that combine strong engineering foundations with practical AI capabilities.

Beyond development, I lead engineering initiatives, mentor developers, review architecture decisions, and collaborate closely with startups and businesses across the UAE and international markets to turn ideas into scalable products.
